title: Hitbox+
description: Hitbox+ is a clean client side mod for advanced hitbox customization and control.
body:
## Hitbox Plus
**Hitbox+** is a lightweight client side Fabric mod that gives you **full control** on hitboxes, So you can change how they look and behave in game.

The goal is simple: Make hitboxes clearer, more useful for practice/combat, and easy to customize without hassle.

❤️ Like the project if it helped you and also make sure to join the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/mqgXV4RcJp)!


## Toggles
![Toggles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/834d1fb746f311ebe858b8ebc75edb1d0c5613ce.png)
![More Toggles!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a436837e953957b2732bcb9d6014c8833e55a98f.png)
## Customize Colors
![Hitbox Colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63f03285ff949719d8382c4cf961049330d7c308.png)

### Main Idea
Vanilla hitboxes are useful, but limited.
Hitbox+ lets you tune width, color behavior, and what entities are rendered, so you can build a clean setup for PvP or anything as your likings!

### Features ✨
- Fully client side configurable GUI
- Per feature toggles for clean control
- Optional projectiles rendering
- Optional players+projectiles only mode (hide mobs/animals)
- Optional self hitbox rendering
- Optional Elytra only player filtering
- Optional direction line and forehead line overlays
- Custom colors with RGB picker
